creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, let's hit Buffalo Wild Wings for the game tonight. I'm down. I will get the five-piece chicken tenders naked, and then I will get a side salad, no croutons, light vinaigrette, and a Diet Coke. Oh, damn. I didn't even know you could order like that. You must not be following Seth G. yet. Shit. I better follow Seth G. right now.
caption:
